PILLAR_A_CONTEXT_MEMORY_MOCKS.content: Cut AWS spending to max $2000/month starting immediately.
Contact the venue to finalize the catering numbers.

PILLAR_B_PRAXIS_SIMULATION_MOCK.sayDoGap: Managers expect increased velocity, but developers predict a massive spike in critical bugs.
PILLAR_B_PRAXIS_SIMULATION_MOCK.insight: Relying purely on AI testing without QA will crash production within 48 hours.
PILLAR_B_PRAXIS_SIMULATION_MOCK.saferVariant: Reduce the QA team by 10% and transition them to become 'AI Testing Supervisors' rather than firing the whole team at once.

conversation.text: By firing the QA team and relying purely on AI testing tools starting Monday, we will drastically cut overhead costs and ship code twice as fast.
Are you kidding? AI hallucinated three critical pipeline errors yesterday. If I don't have QA to backstop me, I'm going to spend all my time fixing production outages instead of coding.

This is completely reckless. AI tools cannot verify compliance with strict data-privacy regulations. We are opening ourselves up to massive liability and potential data breaches by removing human oversight.
